---
title: "Visualisation"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
library(sf)
library(ggspatial)
library(osmdata)
library(ggforce)
library(gt)
library(ggtext)
library(legendry)

```

#### Colorpalette

```{r}
darkblue = "#212842"
midblue = "#4E5B9C"
lightblue = "#5C9EAD"

```


```{r}
# Excel sheet of the spots with details
spots <- read_excel(path = "./data/datasheet_landsurvey.xlsx", sheet = "spots")

# Gib Bay coastline
coast <- st_read("./data/bayofalgib.gpkg")

# Clean the sighting data and import
source("./land_survey.R")


```

# Create a map of the survey sectors

This maps shows the sectors that were surveyed.

```{r}
make_wedge <- function(x0, y0, r, start, end, crs, n = 120) {
  b   <- seq(start, end, length.out = n) * pi / 180
  pts <- cbind(x0 + r * sin(b), y0 + r * cos(b))   # compass: x=sin, y=cos
  ring <- rbind(c(x0, y0), pts, c(x0, y0))         # close through the centre
  st_sfc(st_polygon(list(ring)), crs = crs)
}

proj <- 32630   # UTM zone 30N â€” metres, correct for Gibraltar

R = 6.378e+6


centres <- as.data.frame(spots)
centres <- centres %>% 
  rename(name = spot_name,
         start = spot_bearing1,
         end = spot_bearing2) %>% 
  mutate(r_m = sqrt(2*R*observer_height/20))


# project the centres into metres
xy <- st_coordinates(
  st_transform(st_as_sf(centres, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326), proj)
)

sectors <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(centres)), function(i) {
  g <- make_wedge(xy[i, 1], xy[i, 2], centres$r_m[i],
                  centres$start[i], centres$end[i], crs = proj)
  st_sf(name = centres$name[i], geometry = g)
}))

sectors <- st_transform(sectors, 4326)   # back to lon/lat for the map

sectors <- sectors  %>% 
  filter(name != "MedSteps" & name != "WestSide")

# Sector map
sector_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = coast) +
  geom_sf(data = sectors, aes(fill = name), colour = "black", alpha = 0.6) +
  #geom_sf(data = data$geometry,  colour = "black", alpha = 0.4) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-5.438, -5.248),
    ylim = c(36.05, 36.195)
  ) +
  
  labs(fill = "Sectors") +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    Europa = darkblue,
    PrinceGeorge = midblue,
    SandyBay = lightblue
  )) +
  my_theme_trans()

sector_map


```

```{r}
active_spots <- spots %>%  
  filter(spot_name != "MedSteps" & spot_name != "WestSide") %>% 
  select(spot_name, observer_height, lat, lon)


```

```{r, Export}
ggsave(filename = "./figures/sector_map.png", sector_map, width = 1920, height = 1920, dpi = 200, units = "px")

```



# Visualise the sightings

! Old script
```{r}

# Create labels for the different spots
spot_label <- data %>% 
  select(spot_name, geometry, observer_height) %>% 
  mutate(y_nudge = case_when(
    spot_name == "SandyBay" ~ 0.003,
    spot_name == "Europa" ~ 0.003,
    spot_name == "WestSide" ~ 0.003,
    
    TRUE ~ - 0.003),
    
    x_nudge = case_when(
      spot_name == "WestSide" ~ -0.002,
      spot_name == "MedSteps" ~ 0.002,
      
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )


sightings <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = coast, fill = "lightgray", alpha = .8) +
  geom_sf(data = st_set_geometry(data, "geometry")) +   # Set geometry so aes does not missalign
  # geom_sf(data = sectors, aes(fill = name), colour = "black", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_sf(data = st_set_geometry(data, "sighting_poi"), #%>%  filter(date.x >= "2026-06-09"),
          aes(fill = species, linetype = species ), colour = "black", size = 3, shape = 21) +
  # geom_sf_label(data = st_set_geometry(data, "geometry"),
  #               aes(label = spot_name), size = 2, nudge_y = spot_label$y_nudge) +
  # geom_sf_text(data = st_set_geometry(data, "sighting_poi"),
  #             aes(label = species), size = 3, nudge_y = -0.003) +
  #facet_wrap(~ sector) +
  
  
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-5.438, -5.248),
    ylim = c(36.05, 36.195)
  ) +
  labs(fill = "Species",
       linetype = "Whales") +
  theme_minimal() +
  
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22, 24)) + 
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(     # If only one value is defined the rest is grayed out by default
   delphinidae = "lightblue",
   common_dolphin = "darkblue",
   striped_dolphin = "blue",
   fin_whale = "purple"
   
  ),
  labels = c(
     delphinidae = "Delphinidae",
     common_dolphin = "<b>Common Dolphin</b> <br> <i>Delphinus delphis</i>",
     striped_dolphin = "Striped Dolphin",
     fin_whale = "<b>Fin whale</b> <br> <i> Balaenoptera physalus </i>"
     
   ))+
  
  my_theme_trans() +
  
  theme(
  legend.text = ggtext::element_markdown()
)

sightings


```

Nesting the legend to make it more understandable

```{r}

# species & their groups, in display order
sp_levels <- c("common_dolphin", "striped_dolphin", "delphinidae", "fin_whale", "unidentified")
sp_groups <- c("Odontoceti",     "Odontoceti",      "Odontoceti",  "Mysticeti", "Other")

# count sightings per species, then sum per group
sp_counts  <- table(factor(data$species, levels = sp_levels))   # per-species counts
grp_totals <- tapply(as.integer(sp_counts), sp_groups, sum)     # summed per group

# bake the totals into the group-header strings
group_headers <- paste0(sp_groups, " (n = ", grp_totals[sp_groups], ")")

species_groups <- key_group_lut(sp_levels, group_headers)

sightings <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = coast, fill = "lightgray", alpha = .8) +
  geom_sf(data = st_set_geometry(data, "geometry"), shape = 25, fill = "gray10") +
  geom_sf(data = st_set_geometry(data, "sighting_poi"),
          aes(fill = species), colour = "black", size = 3, shape = 21) +   # linetype removed
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-5.438, -5.248), ylim = c(36.05, 36.195)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      delphinidae     = lightblue,
      common_dolphin  = darkblue,
      striped_dolphin = midblue,
      fin_whale       = "purple",
      unidentified    = "gray"
    ),
    labels = c(
      delphinidae     = "<i>Delphinidae sp.</i>",
      common_dolphin  = "<b>Common Dolphin</b><br><i>Delphinus delphis</i>",
      striped_dolphin = "<b>Striped Dolphin</b><br><i>Stenella coeruleoalba</i>",
      fin_whale       = "<b>Fin whale</b><br><i>Balaenoptera physalus</i>",
      unidentified    = "Unidentified"
    )
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend_group(key = species_groups)) +   # <- the nesting happens here
  labs(fill = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  my_theme_trans() +
  theme(
    legend.text              = ggtext::element_markdown(),
    legendry.legend.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold")   # styles the group headers
  )

sightings


```



```{r, Export}
ggsave(filename = "./figures/sightings_complete.png", sightings, width = 1920, height = 1920, dpi = 200, units = "px")
```

Check how far the sightings are off the observer -> count vs distance

```{r}
location <- unique(spots$spot_name)

for (l in location) {
  d <- data %>% 
    filter(spot_name == l)
  
  plot <- d %>% 
    ggplot()+
    geom_histogram(aes(
      x = distance
    ), fill = darkblue) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Distance vs Number of sighting at", l)
    ) +
    my_theme_trans()


  ggsave(filename = paste0("./figures/distance_",l, ".png"), plot, width = 1920, height = 1920, dpi = 200, units = "px")
  
}



distance <- data %>% 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_histogram(aes(
    x = distance,
    fill = sector
  ), binwidth = 550, color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ sector) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    S = darkblue,
    W = midblue,
    E = lightblue
  )) +
  
  my_theme_trans() +
  theme(
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "black"))

distance
```

```{r}
ggsave(filename = "./figures/distance_facet.png", distance, width = 1920, height = 1520, dpi = 200, units = "px")
```
